mapper.insert: INSERT INTO documents (public_id, tenant_id, workspace_id, owner_user_id, title, status, latest_revision, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{publicId}, #{tenantId}, #{workspaceId}, #{ownerUserId}, #{title}, #{status}, #{latestRevision}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, public_id, tenant_id, workspace_id, owner_user_id, title, status, latest_revision, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at FROM documents WHERE public_id = #{publicId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND workspace_id = #{workspaceId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE documents SET latest_revision = #{newLatestRevision}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND latest_revision = #{expectedLatestRevision}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO document_revisions (document_id, revision, content, content_hash, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{documentId}, #{revision}, #{content}, #{contentHash}, #{createdBy}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE documents SET deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE documents SET deleted_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
